data.title: Dotz Nano Partners with Bar-Ilan University for CO2 Capture
data.description:
Dotz Nano Limited (AU:DTZ) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Dotz Nano Limited has entered into a strategic collaboration with Bar-Ilan University to develop a pilot electrochemical system for CO2 removal through Direct Air Capture (DAC). This partnership, supported by a $250,000 grant from the Israel Innovation Authority, aims to advance carbon management technologies, potentially leading to a commercialization phase with an exclusive license agreement. The innovative technology promises to enhance efficiency and reduce energy consumption, positioning Dotz at the forefront of the growing DAC market.

data.title: Microbot Medical Stockholders Approve Key Proposals in 2024
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Microbot Medical ( (MBOT) ) has provided an announcement.

At the Annual Meeting held on December 17, 2024, Microbot Medical’s stockholders voted on three proposals. The first proposal involved electing two nominees to the Board of Directors, with Prattipati Laxminarain and David J. Wilson being elected to serve until the 2027 Annual Meeting. The second proposal approved an amendment to increase the authorized shares of common stock by 600,000, while the third proposal ratified Brightman Almagor Zohar & Co. as the independent registered public accounting firm for 2024.

More about Microbot Medical

data.title: Sendas Distribuidora to Delist from NYSE and Focus on B3
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Sendas Distribuidora ( (ASAI) ) has shared an announcement.

Sendas Distribuidora’s board of directors has approved the voluntary delisting of its American Depositary Shares from the New York Stock Exchange and the subsequent deregistration with the SEC. This strategic decision aligns with the company’s focus on maintaining efficient operations and cost-effectiveness, as most trading activity occurs on Brazil’s B3 exchange. Despite delisting, Sendas will continue to uphold its corporate governance standards.

More about Sendas Distribuidora

Sendas Distribuidora S.A. is a publicly-held company based in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil. The company operates in the distribution sector, focusing on efficient operations with a low-cost structure. Its market presence is primarily concentrated on B3’s Novo Mercado segment.

data.title: ChargePoint CFO to Assume Accounting Officer Role
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

ChargePoint Holdings ( (CHPT) ) has issued an announcement.

ChargePoint Holdings, Inc. announced the resignation of Henrik Gerdes as Chief Accounting Officer, effective December 13, 2024. Mansi Khetani, the Chief Financial Officer, will take over as principal accounting officer while continuing her current role. The transition is not due to any disagreements, and there will be no changes in Ms. Khetani’s compensation.

data.title: Stifel Financial Reports Record Client Assets Growth
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

An announcement from Stifel Financial ( (SF) ) is now available.

Stifel Financial Corp. reported a record increase in client assets under management, reaching $514 billion in November 2024, driven by strong equity markets and financial advisor recruiting. The firm’s Institutional Group saw improved client activity and investment banking pipeline, indicating a positive operating environment.

More about Stifel Financial

Stifel Financial Corp. is a financial services holding company based in St. Louis, Missouri. It operates through several subsidiaries, providing securities brokerage, investment banking, trading, investment advisory, and related financial services in the United States, Canada, the United Kingdom, and Europe. It also offers consumer and commercial lending solutions through Stifel Bank and trust services through its trust companies.
